assignment.title: Polygraphing and Forensic Writing Case Studies Assignment
assignment.instructor_text:
Both polygraph technology and forensic writing analysis have been used in many historical cases to solve crimes.  In this assignment you will examine some of these cases and apply your knowledge.  You will also research other historical cases.

Complete the following assignment about solving crimes using polygraphing and/or forensic writing analysis techniques. Click on the image below to make a copy of the Polygraphing and Forensic Writing Analysis Case Studies Assignment.  Remember to double click on the header to open it and add your name to the document.

When you have completed the assignment, upload it below and select Submit to complete your submission.

Revisit the Course Information section if you need a refresher on how to submit your assignments.
